companyText.text1: A good name was quickly established on the market, as customers were served with the best quality and service. The Dücker-Medizintechnik warehouse was constantly expanded to meet customer requirements. For this reason, the location was changed in 1994. The company moved to its current office and production building in Melsungen. An ISO class 8 clean room for the production of disposable medical products was built here.
companyText.text2: Dücker Medizintechnik is a certified manufacturer of sterile and non-sterile tubing sets and supplies the German and European market for well-known manufacturers and set packers. The service area was expanded in 2001. Surgical mechanics were employed to carry out repairs to surgical instruments. This step was trend-setting for our company.
companyText.text3: With its own repair service, Dücker Medizintechnik has become the point of contact for clinics, outpatient practices and external medical technology.
companyText.text4: Since 01.01.2003, the company has been managed by Mr. Marc Dücker as Managing Director.
companyText.text5: Today, we are your contact for the commercial brokerage of pharmaceutical products, medical and orthopaedic articles and laboratory supplies, medical supplies, dental supplies, dental instruments, hospital and geriatric care supplies.

innovationText.text:
Medical technology is constantly evolving and we are at the forefront of this change. Our ability to develop innovative solutions and put them into production has made us a recognized player in the industry.

We continuously invest in research and development to ensure that our customers always benefit from the latest developments.
innovationText.title: Quality, innovation and customer satisfaction

content.title: Company & Mission
content.titleText: Dücker Medizintechnik was founded in 1979 by Mr. Rolf Dücker with a clear vision.
